name: Priya Sharma
text: Hithu Global Holidays made our Kerala honeymoon absolutely magical! Every detail was perfectly planned — the houseboat was luxurious, and the itinerary was seamless. Can't recommend them enough!

name: Rajesh Kumar
text: Took our family of 6 on the Rajasthan Heritage Tour. The kids loved the camel safari! Their team was always available on WhatsApp for any queries. Truly professional service.

name: Ananya Reddy
text: Our Bali trip was a dream come true! The villa was stunning, the sunrise trek was breathtaking, and the entire trip was hassle-free. Hithu Global Holidays is our go-to travel partner now.

name: Vikram Patel
text: Excellent planning for our Dubai family trip. The desert safari was the highlight! Their transparent approach — no hidden costs — really stood out. Will definitely book again.

name: Sneha Nair
text: The Maldives overwater villa experience was beyond our expectations! Hithu Global arranged everything perfectly. From airport pickup to farewell dinner — every moment was special.

name: Arjun Mehta
text: We explored Meghalaya with Hithu Global and it was incredible. The living root bridges, Dawki river — everything was so well organized. Their local knowledge really shows.
